title: Lock 'Main Table' View
excerpt: Locking a view function does not work on the main view, which I believe is more critical because we have many background columns that we prefer to keep hidden.

posts.author: AGLwork (Aysegul)
posts.cookedHtml: Locking a view function does not work on the main view, which I believe is more critical because we have many background columns that we prefer to keep hidden.
